timing.note: Placeholder timing.json files were written for each run because exact subagent timing was unavailable in this inline eval.

top_fixes: Generic baseline missed explicit license/maintenance checks for convenience packages; keep dependency-health checks prominent.
Generic baseline missed a recorded dependency decision/deps.md artifact; keep artifact recording mandatory for triggered dependency changes.
Generic baseline mentioned lockfile refresh but not lockfile behavior provenance; keep direct-upgrade vs override/resolution vs lockfile-only documentation explicit.
Package-manager near-miss passed both configs; future evals could make this more discriminating or retain it only as an over-trigger guard.
